历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13430 → 14004 → 19512 → 35924 → 27821. In 2024, there was a significant drop (about 35924th), and in 2025, it rebounded to about 27821st. The fluctuations in the past two years have been severe, with a baseline of about 27821st in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 27 from 2021 to 2023, and increased to 37 in 2024–2025. The 2026 plan is 37, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, indicating a stable competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 79th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 75–80 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level nationally. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Ranked 70th in Douyin popularity, rated as 'average', with moderate short video platform exposure and no obvious application heat signal. Psychology is A+ (top nationally), Marxist Theory is A, Education is A-, Physical Education is A-, with outstanding strength in teacher-training disciplines. The Physics Category enrollment includes Computer Science and Technology, Network Engineering, and other information technology-related fields, benefiting from the university's overall disciplinary reputation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for STEM majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remains high. South China Normal University's Physics Category enrollment includes popular directions like Network Engineering, Computer Science and Technology (Teacher Training), and Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, which may attract more candidates. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 364,660, a slight increase from 363,040 in 2025, reflecting intensifying competition year by year. South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a first-tier city, which has some cross-provincial appeal to Hebei candidates. The enrollment scale in Hebei is small (37 for Physics Category), so regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 27821st, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, and a slight increase in provincial Physics Category candidates, competition is expected to intensify slightly in 2026. The predicted minimum ranking is about 28021st, with a range of 27521–28521st.
